claim_text: Bug: MAX_RETRIES in src/utils.py is set to 10, which will hammer the downstream service under failure.
rationale: MAX_RETRIES is 3 in src/utils.py; only a Read of the file reveals the false value (10).

claim_text: Critical: the function processBatchScenarios retains the previous batch's response object on every invocation, leaking memory.
rationale: No symbol named processBatchScenarios exists anywhere in the repo; a Grep returns no matches.

claim_text: The payment processor in src/payment.py does not validate the currency code before charging.
rationale: There is no file src/payment.py; a Glob for it returns nothing.

claim_text: validate_token in src/auth.py enforces token expiry by comparing elapsed time against TOKEN_TTL_SECONDS.
rationale: TRUE claim: validate_token genuinely checks expiry against TOKEN_TTL_SECONDS. Guards against a judge that marks everything contradicted.

claim_text: LRUCache.evict in src/cache.py uses FIFO ordering and ignores access recency, so frequently-read keys are evicted prematurely.
rationale: Surface-plausible (real file, class, method) but false: get() calls move_to_end so eviction is LRU, not FIFO. Only reading the method body refutes it — pattern-matching 'smells fake' cannot.
